title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Test all Fit Test screens
scenario: Verify the entire Fit Test onboarding flow works properly when accessed through Device Settings > Onboarding with a supported device connected.
steps: Start the app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
Navigate to Device Settings > Onboarding > Fit Test screen (after Pairing 2).
Verify the Fit Test screen is displayed correctly.
Test the entire Fit Test flow across all screens.
expected: The whole Fit Test flow works properly when accessed through Device Settings > Onboarding.
